/** * @fileoverview Rule to flag when initializing octal literal * @author Ilya Volodin */ "use strict"; //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ // Rule Definition //------------------------------------------------------------------------------ /** @type {import('../types').Rule.RuleModule} */ module.exports = { meta: { type: "suggestion", docs: { description: "Disallow octal literals", recommended: true, url: "https://eslint.org/docs/latest/rules/no-octal", }, schema: [], messages: { noOctal: "Octal literals should not be used.", }, }, create(context) { return { Literal(node) { if (typeof node.value === "number" && /^0\d/u.test(node.raw)) { context.report({ node, messageId: "noOctal", }); } }, }; }, };
